# Prop PNL

> Prop firm profit and loss tracker that pulls real payouts and fees directly from your bank.

Prop PNL is a web application for prop traders to track their true profit and loss across multiple prop trading firms. It connects to bank accounts via Teller, auto-detects transactions from 47+ prop firms, and generates verified P&L reports.

## Core Features

- Bank-verified P&L tracking (not self-reported)
- Auto-detection and categorization of prop firm payouts and fees
- Support for up to 5 bank accounts
- Shareable public P&L links
- CSV and PDF export
- Monthly and per-firm profit breakdowns
- Leaderboard for verified traders

## Prop Firm Directory

Prop PNL maintains a curated, verified directory of futures prop trading firms. Each firm is reviewed for payout reliability, fair rules, and transparent pricing before being listed.

- [Compare Prop Firms](https://proppnl.com/compare)
- [Firm Directory](https://proppnl.com/firms)
- [Discounts & Promo Codes](https://proppnl.com/discounts)
